commit_scope: Convert Android active mic, camera, and accelerator sample learning into the Form-native android-mesh-learning floor and carrier.

commands: coord join && coord claim "android active mic camera accelerator samples"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/android-mesh-learning-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed and wellness had no task-blocking local failure. The Form-native android-mesh-learning proof now returns 32767 with validate.sh output: fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent. The fourth-arm manifest gate returns PASS-4WAY android-mesh-learning. The Android debug APK builds successfully after pointing Gradle at the local SDK path. No Python carrier was added or modified for active sample learning; Python use in this record is limited to repository evidence validation. The authorized SM-S918U1 was visible through adb, but the phone was PIN-locked during live receipt capture, so the app could not be tapped into Start sharing and the Mac witness still reported zero live frames. The live nonzero active-counter receipt remains the next physical proof gap.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy was requested or performed in this slice.

phase_gate.gate: Active mic, camera, and accelerator samples must be represented as Form-native learning rows before routing speech, vision, or multimodal work native-first.
phase_gate.next: Unlock the phone, tap Start sharing, capture a receipt with nonzero mic RMS, camera luma, and GPU readback counters, then extend the GPU summary floor toward Vulkan/NNAPI kernel parity receipts.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Coherence Sense can sample mic RMS, camera luma, and GPU EGL readback summaries while sharing and expose those counters through snapshots/body state without storing raw audio, frames, or GPU buffers. Form recipes can consume summary-only active sample rows and route speech, vision, and multimodal lanes native-first when mic/camera/GPU are active.
test_flows: Active samples are represented by aml-active-sample rows with lane, protocol, codec, count, metric, trust, privacy, and active flag.
Valid mic RMS, camera luma, and GPU readback rows are summary-only and satisfy the active media floor.
Speech, vision, and multimodal routes become native-first only when their required active sample lanes are present.
The Android carrier compiles with Camera2 luma sampling and OpenGL ES/EGL readback sampling.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is Form-native active media sample learning plus a compiling Android carrier. The remaining gap is not grammar or Python conversion; it is a live unlocked-phone sharing receipt with nonzero active counters, followed by richer heldout learners and Vulkan/NNAPI receipts.
